name: @brain/evidence-normalization
description: Dormant AI Brain evidence-normalization contracts: the single common language every future source normalizer must speak — the NormalizerContract interface, the deterministic NormalizationContext, the canonical signal-key grammar, and pure NormalizedSignal validators (M50). No normalizers, no providers, no storage, no clock, no randomness. Depends only on @brain/evidence-contracts.
